name: @rhombus-std/config
description: Layered configuration engine: ConfigurationBuilder/Root/Section, compareConfigurationKeys, the Memory provider, an index-navigable Section tree, and a runtime schema (Schema/Infer/OPTIONAL) that coerces on build().
//configuration-builder-subpath: Every provider package augments ConfigurationBuilder via `declare module "@rhombus-std/config/configuration-builder"`, NOT the barrel ("@rhombus-std/config") -- TS's declaration merging for a class re-exported through another module (`export { ConfigurationBuilder } from "./configuration-builder"` in ./src/index.ts) does not merge back onto the class as seen through the declaring module's own specifier. Augmenting the barrel directly works for exactly one augmenter, but the moment a SECOND package (or core's own addInMemoryCollection) also augments the class, TS sees two non-interchangeable 'ConfigurationBuilder' phantom types and errors on `return this` inside the prototype-assignment function -- reproduced and confirmed during config-json's build. Now that config is dist-referenced (§78, #68): config's OWN program resolves this subpath to ./src/ConfigurationBuilder.ts via the package-unique `config-source` custom condition (listed FIRST, ahead of `types`) -- so config's with-type-augment.ts merge sees the concrete class in its declaring module while dist doesn't exist yet -- while every external consumer (no `config-source` set) resolves `types` -> the rolled ./dist/index.d.ts. That rolled barrel is a single flat file: ConfigurationBuilder is declared directly in it, no re-export chain to trip over, so a provider's declare-module merge onto this subpath lands on the same object the barrel exposes. The `bun` per-file emit stays for white-box test execution. `config-source` is dev-only (absent from publishConfig), where this subpath collapses onto ./dist/index.* like the reference `.`; a provider's rolled dist/index.d.ts keeps the `declare module` verbatim (respectExternal: true), so this subpath must exist in the PUBLISHED package.json too.
//configuration-manager-subpath: Same rationale as configuration-builder-subpath above, substituting ConfigurationManager for ConfigurationBuilder: every provider package now ALSO installs its augmentation onto ConfigurationManager (declare module + a second applyAugmentations call, see docs/decisions.md), so it must declare-merge onto `@rhombus-std/config/configuration-manager`, not the barrel, or the same phantom-duplicate-type error reappears. Same collapsed shape: `config-source` -> ./src/ConfigurationManager.ts for config's own program, `types` -> the rolled ./dist/index.d.ts for external consumers. `./src/ConfigurationManager.ts` has no generic type parameter, so there's no TS2428 arity concern the way there is for ConfigurationBuilder<T>.
